Video.summary: Get ready to cry... from laughter! In this episode, a crowd cheers for a mother in labor, a bike pump ejects a baby from a stroller and a strong man smacks his fans!

Video.summary: Get ready to laugh out loud with Just for Laughs Gags! This episode features an online breathalyzer test prank and greedy soup. Enjoy a fun time for the whole family with a dozen of the world's funniest pranks.

Video.summary: Turn on the laughing gas with this Gags episode! A zealous priest slaps churchgoers, a woman gets her top ripped off by a bird feeder, a kid drives his own school bus and a sommelier dupes clients into drinking wine with their nose!

Image.alt: Just for Laughs GAGS - S.20 E.7

Video.summary: The laughs pile up in this episode! A janitor takes a little girl’s tongue, a father sells his daughter’s dog to buy beer and a homeless rock band surprises participants!

Video.summary: The laughs pile up in this episode! A magician frees a prisoner with a vanishing trick, a jigg overflows with popcorn, bread get sliced karate style and a soldier strips and leaves for war!

Video.summary: Prepare to roar with laughter with this episode! A corn cooking pot turns into a spa, a head scout plays hide-and-seek in a coffin, an arrested mannequin becomes real and a paramedic sells an injured man’s bike!
